summary: Ukrainian FPV drones are striking Russian positions and equipment deep behind the front lines, including in the outskirts of Donetsk and near Peski, with attacks reported up to 25-30 km from the front. Russian forces are struggling with electronic warfare effectiveness against drones like the Lightning, which can evade detection by not transmitting control signals. The BM-35 and BM-70 drone attacks on Sumy and other cities have ceased, possibly due to production issues, increased EW activity, or the loss of Starlink connectivity. On March 10, 2026, the Russian "Rubicon" Center reported destroying 162 Ukrainian targets, including personnel and UAV control centers, across multiple directions.
